summary: Regression sweep of V2AI rebuild + Music (Tunes) UX fixes. All 10 requested feature groups pass. V2AI standby shows wallpaper + purple AI orb + heading + waveform + Ready pill and hold-btn is ABSENT as expected. V2AI recommend flow renders 20 rec cards with focus on card-0, ArrowRight/Up/Down/Enter all work, Enter lands on /title/... with NO ?autoplay in URL. V2AI 'play the matrix' lands on /title/movie/tt0133093 in ~1s with NO autoplay param and detail page renders with its Play button. Music side-nav has no Karaoke and expands to data-expanded=true on focus. Radio chips (21) render as pills with 10px gap, active chip has gradient. Search 'eminem' shows 8 artists in a single row, pictures-first (6 real + 2 gradient fallbacks), no like-* hearts in D-pad chain (input->artist card->track row->Enter opens tunes-mini-player). Artist /music/artist/13 opens at scrollTop 0, focus on tunes-artist-play, hero position sticky, scroll isolation OK. Album /music/album/302127 shows tunes-album-play + 14 track rows, first row click opens mini-player, mini-now-btn opens tunes-fullplayer with prev/toggle/next, close returns. Library empty state heart is centered above text. Music home hero title clamps to max 2 lines (webkitLineClamp:2). Backend /api/v2ai/config returns background_image_url starting '/assets/' with hold_button_visible:false. GET /api/v2ai/asset?path=/assets/v2ai/background.png returns image/png 200 (1.66MB).

minor.issue: HEAD returns 405 Method Not Allowed (allow: GET). Non-blocking; task only requires GET.

critical_code_review_comments: Album page (and possibly others) triggers a React ErrorBoundary/dev-overlay error: 'Permissions check failed' (TypeError). Console: '[ErrorBoundary] unhandled rejection: TypeError: Permissions check failed'. Root cause is almost certainly a call to navigator.permissions.query({name:...}) or navigator.mediaSession/notification permission in a sandboxed iframe/preview where the Permissions API rejects. Functionality is NOT blocked (mini/full player still works), but the red dev-mode overlay appears on album page after track playback starts. Recommend wrapping the offending Permissions/MediaSession call in try/catch and defaulting to 'denied'.
Console still emits benign React warning: 'Invalid DOM property fetchpriority. Did you mean fetchPriority?' (carried over from iter 65). Likely on an tag.
Radio page emits a 402 Payment Required from a resource (likely a station artwork/logo). Non-blocking but noisy.
V2AI results page emits a 502 for one internal call (likely a background metadata/poster fetch) and a CORS/ERR_FAILED on plexio.stream — both non-blocking for D-pad + navigation flow.
Vesper [data-testid=side-nav] still does not expose data-expanded; Tunes side-nav does. Consistency nit only.
test_credentials: Vesper login testuser/testpass123. Profile seed via localStorage as documented (onnowtv-profiles-v1, onnowtv-active-profile-v1, both plain + :testuser suffix). /v2ai reached via SPA nav (click nav-v2ai then pushState+popstate).
seed_data_creation: Profile 'p-test-1' seeded in localStorage per task spec.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 10 feature groups verified in this iteration. Key confirmations: (1) V2AI backend endpoints: /api/v2ai/config -> {heading_text:'Hold OK and speak into your remote', background_image_url:'/assets/v2ai/background.png?ts=...', hold_button_visible:false}; /api/v2ai/asset?path=%2Fassets%2Fv2ai%2Fbackground.png -> 200 image/png (1.66MB). (2) V2AI standby: v2ai-wallpaper (img with object-fit:cover), v2ai-waveform, ai orb + purple 'AI' text, 'Ready' pill, heading text, and hold-btn is DOM-absent. (3) V2AI results D-pad: pushState('/v2ai?q=recommend%20some%20movies')+PopStateEvent -> 20 v2ai-rec-card-N + v2ai-ask-again; auto-focus lands on card-0; ArrowRight card-0->card-1->card-2; ArrowUp card-2->ask-again in one press; ArrowDown ask-again->card-2; Enter on card -> /title/movie/tt8814476 with NO autoplay in URL. (4) V2AI play intent: pushState('/v2ai?q=play%20the%20matrix') -> /title/movie/tt0133093 in ~1s with NO ?autoplay, detail page renders with detail-play-autoplay Play button, no auto playback. (5) Music side nav order = [tunes-nav-brand, home, search, radio, australia, podcasts, library, profile, settings]; NO karaoke; data-expanded flips to 'true' on focus. (6) Radio: 21 tunes-radio-chip-* pills; container .tunes-chips gap:10px; border-radius:999px; padding 8px 18px; tabIndex 0; active 'all' chip has gradient bg. (7) Search 'eminem': 8 search-artist-* cards in first row (top:same-Y within 20px); first 6 have real imgs (naturalWidth 1000), last 2 have .avatar-fallback with linear-gradient bg (pictures-first sort). Search input ArrowDown -> search-artist-* (never like-*); ArrowRight moves between artist cards; further ArrowDown -> tunes-result-track-*; Enter on track -> tunes-mini-player appears. (8) Artist /music/artist/13: focus on tunes-artist-play, .tunes-artist-hero position:sticky, layout.scrollTop=0 initially; 5x ArrowDown -> scrollTop=364 while hero_visible_top stays 0 (sticky works). (9) Album /music/album/302127: tunes-album-play visible, 14 track rows; click first row -> tunes-mini-player; tunes-mini-now-btn opens tunes-fullplayer with fullplayer-prev/toggle/next; tunes-fullplayer-close returns. (10) Library empty state heart icon horizontally centered above text (visual confirmation). (11) Hero title clamp: .tunes-hero__title webkitLineClamp='2', height/line-height ratio never exceeds 2.00. Only concern for main agent: 'Permissions check failed' unhandled promise rejection produces dev-mode error overlay on album page after starting playback (functionality still works). See critical_code_review_comments.
rca of the issue: No blocking issues. Non-blocking: 'Permissions check failed' TypeError reaches ErrorBoundary as unhandled rejection when album playback starts — likely a navigator.permissions.query() or navigator.mediaSession call in preview iframe. Recommended fix: wrap that call in try/catch (or Promise.catch) and gracefully fall back so no rejection bubbles up.
